title: Citrus fruits prepared or preserved imported from China (Anti-Dumping Duty 2158)
body: "Anti-Dumping Duty is an Import Duty charged in addition to normal Customs Duty and is applied across the whole EU. It is designed to allow the EU to take action against goods that are sold at less than their normal value - that being defined as the price for ‘like goods’ sold in the exporter’s home market.  "

taxons.title: Customs declarations, duties and tariffs (import and export)
